reaction.name: L-lysine transport out via proton antiport reversible

sulfate transport in via proton symport

H+/K+ gastric/non-gastric P-ATPase and ABC ATPase
uridine transport in via sodium symport

alpha or beta glcosidase (acting on maltoundecaose)

propionate transp or t in via proton symp or t
acetaldehyde transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
